description: VERIFIED LIVE: 新浪新闻 (Sina News) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links carry a /doc-<id> path with the headline as link text. Navigate the tab to news.sina.com.cn (or another sina.com.cn channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: many article links — headline + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: sina_news_headlines
tools.description: Article links on the current 新浪 page (news.sina.com.cn or another channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and url (.../doc-<id>.shtml). VERIFIED.
